name: Talked to insurance adjuster after ladder fall at work, did I mess up?

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster after ladder fall at work, did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Likely; stop talking, get lawyer to handle adjuster.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Possibly; adjusters seek statements to deny or lowball—avoid recorded talks without counsel.[3]

Requests for statements are common traps; politely defer.[2]

- Don't volunteer details.
- Get everything in writing.
- Lawyer handles contact.

Hire now to mitigate; they renegotiate if needed.[1]

description: Likely; stop talking, get lawyer to handle adjuster.[3]
